title: C++ error: cannot convert ‘VlQueue<short unsigned int>’ to ‘short unsigned int’ in assignment

features.name: unpacked queue declaration with bit-vector element type
features.description: Code should include a queue declaration using an unpacked bit-vector as the element type

features.name: queue assignment using dollar-sign index on LHS
features.description: Code should include a queue assignment where the left-hand side uses the $ index to select the entire queue
